title: aira alpicola
intro: Aira alpicola, also known as Alpine Hairgrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Aira alpicola include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Aira alpicola include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
